tests.scenario: User records a mood entry successfully
steps: Navigate to the mood tracking section
tests.expected_result: The system saves the mood entry successfully.

tests.scenario: Mood entry is not saved if the user leaves before saving
steps: Navigate to the mood tracking section
tests.expected_result: No mood entry is saved.

tests.scenario: Reflective prompt is shown after mood tracking
tests.expected_result: The system displays at least one reflective prompt.

tests.scenario: No reflective prompt is shown without a completed entry
steps: Do not complete a mood tracking entry
tests.expected_result: No reflective prompt related to a completed mood entry is displayed.

tests.scenario: User indicates stress and accesses support content
tests.expected_result: The system displays at least one relevant coping resource.

tests.scenario: Support content opens within the app
tests.expected_result: The support-oriented content opens within the app.

tests.scenario: User navigates to informational content area
steps: Navigate to the informational content area
tests.expected_result: The system displays readable mental health information.

tests.scenario: Informational content is readable within the app
tests.expected_result: The informational content is readable within the app interface.

tests.scenario: User searches for informational resources
tests.expected_result: The system displays relevant matching resources.

tests.scenario: User filters informational resources
tests.expected_result: The system displays relevant matching resources.

tests.scenario: User views pricing and access information
steps: Navigate to pricing or access information
tests.expected_result: The system displays the differences between free and paid access.

tests.scenario: Feature limitations are shown before payment
steps: Navigate to pricing or access information
tests.expected_result: The system shows the features and limitations of free and paid access before payment.

tests.scenario: User accesses feature with sensitive personal data
steps: Access a feature involving sensitive personal data
tests.expected_result: The system displays privacy-related information before the user continues.

tests.scenario: Privacy information appears before continuing sensitive feature use
steps: Open a feature involving sensitive personal data
tests.expected_result: Privacy-related information is presented before further action.

tests.scenario: User views data policy section
steps: Open the privacy or data policy section
tests.expected_result: The system shows understandable information about data handling practices.

tests.scenario: Data policy information is readable within the app
steps: Navigate to the privacy or data policy section
tests.expected_result: The data handling information is readable within the app.

tests.scenario: User views mood tracking history
steps: Use an account with previous mood entries
tests.expected_result: The system displays the saved entries.

tests.scenario: Mood history is empty when no saved entries exist
steps: Use an account with no previous mood entries
tests.expected_result: No saved entries are displayed.

tests.scenario: User receives reminder to complete mood tracking
steps: Wait until a scheduled reminder time occurs
tests.expected_result: The system sends a notification prompting the user to log mood information.

tests.scenario: No reminder is sent when reminders are disabled
steps: Wait until a scheduled reminder time occurs
tests.expected_result: No reminder notification is sent.
